'''zavaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yagger|yagger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yagger|yagger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zavaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zævæyæth|zævæyæth]] || [[word:zævæyæj|zævæyæj]] || [[word:zævæyæsh|zævæyæsh]] || [[word:zævæyæ|zævæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavavayath|zavavayath]] || [[word:zavavayaj|zavavayaj]] || [[word:zavavayash|zavavayash]] || [[word:zavavaya|zavavaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavayath|zavayath]] || [[word:zavayaj|zavayaj]] || [[word:zavayash|zavayash]] || [[word:zavaya|zavaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavafyath|zavafyath]] || [[word:zavafyaj|zavafyaj]] || [[word:zavafyash|zavafyash]] || [[word:zavafyaf|zavafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zavayatha|zavayatha]] || [[word:zavayaja|zavayaja]] || [[word:zavayasha|zavayasha]] || [[word:zavayaka|zavayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zavayath|zavayath]] || [[word:zavayaj|zavayaj]] || [[word:zavayash|zavayash]] || [[word:zavaya|zavaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zavayathal|zavayathal]] || [[word:zavayajal|zavayajal]] || [[word:zavayashal|zavayashal]] || [[word:zavayakal|zavayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zavayathatha|zavayathatha]] || [[word:zavayajaja|zavayajaja]] || [[word:zavayashasha|zavayashasha]] || [[word:zavayaka|zavayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zavayathan|zavayathan]] || [[word:zavayajan|zavayajan]] || [[word:zavayashan|zavayashan]] || [[word:zavayakan|zavayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zavayathaoro|zavayathaoro]] || [[word:zavayajaoro|zavayajaoro]] || [[word:zavayashaoro|zavayashaoro]] || [[word:zavayakaoro|zavayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
